framework.name: Security Audit Service Provider Requirements (PASSI)
framework.name_nl: Referentiel d'exigences pour les prestataires d'audit de la securite des systemes d'information (PASSI)
framework.issuing_body: Agence nationale de la securite des systemes d'information (ANSSI)
framework.scope: Qualification requirements for security audit service providers performing audits of information systems
framework.structure_description: Requirements organized by audit type: organizational audit, architecture audit, configuration audit, source code audit, penetration testing. Covers competence, independence, methodology, and reporting.

controls.title: Legal entity and insurance
controls.description: The audit provider shall be a legal entity with professional liability insurance covering audit activities.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire d'audit doit etre une personne morale disposant d'une assurance responsabilite civile professionnelle couvrant les activites d'audit.

controls.title: Security policy for audit activities
controls.title_nl: Politique de securite des activites d'audit
controls.description: The provider shall maintain a security policy covering the protection of audit data, tools, and findings.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit maintenir une politique de securite couvrant la protection des donnees d'audit, des outils et des resultats.

controls.title: Confidentiality commitments
controls.description: All audit personnel shall sign confidentiality agreements covering client information and vulnerabilities discovered.
controls.description_nl: L'ensemble du personnel d'audit doit signer des engagements de confidentialite couvrant les informations du client et les vulnerabilites decouvertes.

controls.title: Independence and impartiality
controls.description: The provider shall demonstrate independence from the audited organization and document any potential conflicts of interest.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit demontrer son independance vis-a-vis de l'organisation auditee et documenter tout conflit d'interets potentiel.

controls.title: Audit tool security
controls.description: Audit tools shall be maintained, secured, and validated. Toolchain provenance shall be documented.
controls.description_nl: Les outils d'audit doivent etre maintenus, securises et valides. La provenance de la chaine d'outils doit etre documentee.

controls.title: Secure communication channels
controls.description: All exchanges of sensitive audit data shall use encrypted communication channels.
controls.description_nl: Tous les echanges de donnees d'audit sensibles doivent utiliser des canaux de communication chiffres.

controls.title: Audit data destruction
controls.description: Audit data, findings, and work products shall be securely destroyed after the retention period.
controls.description_nl: Les donnees d'audit, resultats et documents de travail doivent etre detruits de maniere securisee apres la periode de conservation.

controls.title: Auditor qualification criteria
controls.description: Auditors shall hold relevant certifications (PASSI, OSCP, CEH, or equivalent) and demonstrate at least 2 years of audit experience.
controls.description_nl: Les auditeurs doivent detenir des certifications pertinentes (PASSI, OSCP, CEH ou equivalent) et justifier d'au moins 2 ans d'experience en audit.

controls.title: Continuous professional development
controls.description: Auditors shall maintain their skills through ongoing training and participation in security research.
controls.description_nl: Les auditeurs doivent maintenir leurs competences par une formation continue et la participation a la recherche en securite.

controls.title: Team composition per audit type
controls.title_nl: Composition de l'equipe par type d'audit
controls.description: Each audit engagement shall have a team with documented competence for the specific audit type being performed.
controls.description_nl: Chaque mission d'audit doit disposer d'une equipe dont la competence est documentee pour le type d'audit specifique realise.

controls.title: Organizational audit methodology
controls.description: The provider shall use a structured methodology for organizational audits based on ISO 27001/27002 or equivalent.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit utiliser une methodologie structuree pour les audits organisationnels basee sur ISO 27001/27002 ou equivalent.

controls.title: Document and policy review
controls.description: The audit shall include review of security policies, procedures, incident records, and management reviews.
controls.description_nl: L'audit doit inclure la revue des politiques de securite, procedures, enregistrements d'incidents et revues de direction.

controls.title: Staff interviews
controls.description: The audit shall include structured interviews with key personnel to assess security awareness and practice compliance.
controls.description_nl: L'audit doit inclure des entretiens structures avec le personnel cle pour evaluer la sensibilisation a la securite et la conformite des pratiques.

controls.title: Architecture audit scope
controls.description: Architecture audits shall cover network segmentation, data flows, trust zones, and defense-in-depth mechanisms.
controls.description_nl: Les audits d'architecture doivent couvrir la segmentation reseau, les flux de donnees, les zones de confiance et les mecanismes de defense en profondeur.

controls.title: Architecture documentation review
controls.description: The auditor shall review architecture diagrams, network maps, and data flow diagrams for security weaknesses.
controls.description_nl: L'auditeur doit examiner les diagrammes d'architecture, les cartographies reseau et les diagrammes de flux de donnees pour identifier les faiblesses de securite.

controls.title: Configuration audit scope
controls.description: Configuration audits shall verify system hardening, default credentials removal, and secure configuration baselines.
controls.description_nl: Les audits de configuration doivent verifier le durcissement des systemes, la suppression des identifiants par defaut et les configurations de reference securisees.

controls.title: Configuration benchmarking
controls.description: Configurations shall be assessed against recognized benchmarks (CIS, vendor guidelines, ANSSI guides).
controls.description_nl: Les configurations doivent etre evaluees par rapport a des referentiels reconnus (CIS, guides fournisseurs, guides ANSSI).

controls.title: Source code audit methodology
controls.description: Source code audits shall combine automated scanning and manual expert review of critical code paths.
controls.description_nl: Les audits de code source doivent combiner une analyse automatisee et une revue manuelle experte des chemins de code critiques.

controls.title: Vulnerability classification
controls.description: Identified vulnerabilities shall be classified by severity using a recognized scoring system (CVSS or equivalent).
controls.description_nl: Les vulnerabilites identifiees doivent etre classifiees par severite en utilisant un systeme de notation reconnu (CVSS ou equivalent).

controls.title: Penetration test methodology
controls.description: Penetration tests shall follow a recognized methodology (OWASP, PTES, or equivalent) with defined rules of engagement.
controls.description_nl: Les tests d'intrusion doivent suivre une methodologie reconnue (OWASP, PTES ou equivalent) avec des regles d'engagement definies.

controls.title: Rules of engagement
controls.description: Formal rules of engagement shall define scope, timing, escalation procedures, and emergency contacts before testing begins.
controls.description_nl: Des regles d'engagement formelles doivent definir le perimetre, le calendrier, les procedures d'escalade et les contacts d'urgence avant le debut des tests.

controls.title: Critical finding notification
controls.description: Critical vulnerabilities found during testing shall be immediately reported to the client through the agreed escalation channel.
controls.description_nl: Les vulnerabilites critiques decouvertes pendant les tests doivent etre immediatement signalees au client via le canal d'escalade convenu.

controls.title: Audit report content
controls.description: Audit reports shall include executive summary, methodology, findings with severity ratings, evidence, and remediation recommendations.
controls.description_nl: Les rapports d'audit doivent inclure un resume executif, la methodologie, les constats avec niveaux de severite, les preuves et les recommandations de remediation.

controls.title: Report classification and handling
controls.description: Audit reports shall be classified as confidential and transmitted through secure channels to authorized recipients only.
controls.description_nl: Les rapports d'audit doivent etre classifies confidentiels et transmis par des canaux securises aux seuls destinataires autorises.

controls.title: Remediation follow-up
controls.description: The provider shall offer remediation verification to confirm that identified vulnerabilities have been addressed.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit proposer une verification de remediation pour confirmer que les vulnerabilites identifiees ont ete traitees.
